Scattered Data
AI Structured
Wiki
The Problem

The Hidden Cost of Knowledge Loss

Professionals spend 30–40% of their time searching for information they've already encountered.

Siloed Information

Valuable insights are trapped in individual departments. 80% of enterprise data is inaccessible.

Lost Context

Critical business knowledge vanishes when employees leave, draining institutional memory.

Inefficient Search

Teams waste hours searching for documents, significantly slowing down decision-making.

Unscalable Chaos

As your organization grows, unstructured knowledge becomes a massive liability.

How it works

Three steps to clarity.

Step 1

Feed It

Upload your PDFs, reports, notes, meeting transcripts, SOPs. Any format. We handle the ingestion.

Step 2

We Build It

AI reads every source, extracts concepts, creates cross-linked wiki pages, builds backlinks, and flags contradictions.

Step 3

Query It

Ask any question, get instant precise answers citing your actual documents — not generic AI guesses.

Why Wealthixs

Why not just use ChatGPT?

Generic AI tools aren't built for compounding knowledge. Here's how we're different.

ChatGPT / Claude Forgets everything each session Permanent, compounding knowledge
Notion / Obsidian You have to write it all AI does all writing and organizing
NotebookLM Searches raw docs, no synthesis Compiled structured wiki, not just search
AI freelancers One-off chatbots, no memory Specialized knowledge compounding

Specialization

We only build knowledge bases. Not chatbots, not automation tools.

Maintenance

We don't build and leave. Monthly maintenance means it keeps growing.

No-code delivery

Delivered as clean files. Works in Obsidian, VS Code, or any text editor.

Proven method

Based on the standard AI Wiki pattern by leading researchers.

Who It's For

Built for serious professionals.

CA / Tax / Legal Firms

Drown in GST circulars, SEBI notifications, case law. We build you a queryable compliance brain.

Academic Researchers

50+ papers on a topic, no way to connect them. We map the entire research landscape.

Startup Founders

Market research, competitor analysis, investor reports. We turn them into decisions.

Investment Analysts

200 company reports/year. We turn them into sector intelligence you can query.

Agencies & Consultants

Client history, project learnings, research scattered. We consolidate it all.

HR & Operations

SOPs, policies, training docs nobody can find. We make them instantly accessible.

Clear, upfront pricing.

STARTER

₹15kone-time

Basic structural schema
wiki/index.md initialized

RESEARCH

Deep structured knowledge base. Unlocks real insights.

Concept + Entity pages
Full wiki health check
1-hr prompt training
Unlock Research

TEAM

₹1Lone-time

Enterprise scale. Everyone on the same page.

Company-wide wiki (SOPs, HR)
Team onboarding (5 people)
Obsidian query interface

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

We seamlessly embed our AI-powered knowledge base directly into your Notion workspace, creating a unified and intelligent hub.

Starter Brain: 5–7 days. Full Research Brain: 2–3 weeks. Team Knowledge Base: 4–6 weeks.

Yes. We build custom schemas for every domain — whether you're in law, finance, academia, or consulting.

All packages include initial support. Our monthly retainer plans include continuous wiki updates, health checks, and priority async support.

Yes. Your knowledge base is built locally or in your own private storage. We never retain your documents.
